summary: Tested Phase 5 Medium Learning - Daily Analysis APIs. All 29 backend tests passed (100%). All 5 services (CalibrationService, ContextPerformanceService, ConfirmationValidatorService, PlaybookPerformanceService, EdgeDecayService) are properly initialized with MongoDB and all 16 endpoints working correctly. Services return successful responses with zero counts as expected (no trade data in database).

service_status.details: Returns status of all 5 services with db_connected=true for each

calibration_config.details: Returns default TQS thresholds (80/65/50/35), setup_overrides, regime_adjustments

calibration_analyze.details: Analyzes trades and generates recommendations. Returns 0 with empty trade data.

calibration_history.details: Returns calibration history with applied_only filter

context_performance_update.details: Updates context performance stats from trades

context_performance_report.details: Generates daily/weekly/monthly reports with heat_map, best/worst_contexts

confirmation_validate.details: Validates all 8 confirmation types (volume, rvol, tape, l2_support, vwap_respect, trend_alignment, sector_momentum, news_catalyst)

confirmation_all.details: Returns stats for all confirmation types with confirmation_types list

playbook_update.details: Updates playbook performance from trade outcomes

playbook_report.details: Returns linkage report with top/underperforming playbooks, execution gaps

edge_decay_analyze.details: Analyzes all edges for decay with critical_alerts, warnings

edge_decay_all.details: Returns metrics for all tracked edges

daily_analysis.details: Runs complete EOD analysis: calibration + context_performance + confirmations + playbooks + edge_decay

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Unused 'statistics' import in 4 service files - cosmetic only
Minor: Unused local variable 'confirmations' in confirmation_validator_service.py line 201
All services properly exclude MongoDB _id from responses
Proper dataclass usage with to_dict()/from_dict() for serialization
All services gracefully handle empty trade data, returning successful responses with zero counts
seed_data_creation: None - Services work with empty data gracefully
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 Medium Learning is complete. All 16 endpoints at /api/medium-learning/* working. 5 services: CalibrationService (TQS threshold tuning), ContextPerformanceService (setup+regime+time tracking), ConfirmationValidatorService (8 confirmation types), PlaybookPerformanceService (strategy-to-results linking), EdgeDecayService (rolling window decay detection). Daily analysis endpoint runs all 5 services in sequence. All return successful responses with zero counts due to empty trade_outcomes collection.
